result: If I could change the world in one way, I’d make accurate, trustworthy knowledge available to every person, in every language they speak. I think when people have reliable information—about health, history, science, each other—they’re better equipped to solve problems, challenge injustice, and make decisions that improve their own lives and communities. It wouldn’t fix everything, but it would give everyone a fairer chance to understand the world and shape it.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
